## Mustache.MustacheTemplate.render() method

Renders the template with the given context. Use this for pre-validated contexts where you've already checked that all required variables are present.

**Signature:**

```typescript
render(context: unknown): Result<string>;
```

context

The context object for template rendering


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;string&gt;

Success with the rendered string, or Failure if rendering fails
